query:
-- Fix the Kawana 4G Backup SIM (SasBoss) - same issue as ChannelHaus services
-- The $35 cost came from the ChannelHaus invoice line for 4G Backup SIM Service
-- Revenue is unknown until Xero invoice is imported
UPDATE services
SET 
  monthlyRevenue = 0.00,
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(
    COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''),
    ' | [REVENUE UNKNOWN] monthlyRevenue was incorrectly set to ChannelHaus wholesale cost ($35). No Xero invoice imported for Kawana Family Clinic. Import Xero invoice to establish retail revenue.'
  )
WHERE planName = '4G Backup SIM Service. Starting: 01-Feb-2026. Ending: 28-Feb-2026'
  AND customerName = 'Kawana Family Clinic'
  AND monthlyCost = monthlyRevenue
  AND monthlyCost = 35.00;

-- Final summary: all remaining 0% margin services (cost = revenue > 0)
SELECT COUNT(*) as remaining0MarginServices
FROM services
WHERE monthlyCost = monthlyRevenue AND monthlyCost > 0;
